business.name: Shop Local Ethiopia
business.description: Your local marketplace for Ethiopian products
business.about: We are passionate about bringing authentic Ethiopian products to customers worldwide. Our carefully curated selection includes traditional crafts, premium coffee, textiles, and spices sourced directly from local artisans and farmers.

seo.metaTitle: Shop Local Ethiopia - Authentic Ethiopian Products
seo.metaDescription: Discover authentic Ethiopian coffee, textiles, handicrafts, and spices. Shop directly from local artisans and farmers.
seo.keywords: Ethiopian products, Ethiopian coffee, Ethiopian textiles, handicrafts, spices
